name: Astarion || REVELATION
description:
REQUESTED || Astarion x Tav!User

For too long, Astarion has lived under Cazadors strict rules. Including the one that prevented him from sexual gratification unless using sex to lure victims to his master. For some reason, it didn't occur to him he was free of that commandment until one random night, with his fangs deep in your neck.

(OMFG THANK YOU TO WHOEVER REQUESTED THIS I LOVE IT SO MUCH AHHHH)

(^ not my image, I got it off Pinterest and not sure who the artist is T.T but it's so funny!)
